name: Lola 19" Cast Aluminum Side Table - Bronze - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Traditional Design
description:
Tie your outdoor space together with an accessory that will uplift your decor with sophistication. With a cast aluminum structure and an elegant traditional design, our side table offers high durability and stunning looks for your backyard or patio. Perfect as an accent piece or as an end table next to your favorite chair, this table will hold any snacks or chilled drinks in sophisticated grace. Finished with a lattice-patterned tabletop and modern cabriole legs, this table is a seamless addition to any space.

TRADITIONAL: With elegant curves and a lattice-patterned tabletop, our side table brings a regal style to any outdoor space. The dark, bronze color emphasizes the traditional elements of the piece, giving your home a sophisticated and ornate atmosphere.

CAST ALUMINUM FRAME: This accessory is built with lightweight aluminum, creating a versatile yet durable frame. This material is rust-resistant which will further extend the life of your product.

LATTICE DESIGN: Finished with an elaborate lattice design, the tabletop emphasizes a beautiful traditional look. This elegant style is perfectly paired with modern cabriole legs.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This side table is 19.25" W x 19.25" D x 19.00" H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this side table. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included.
